---
title: "Roads - data completness measure"
author: "Eliya Levin"
date: "2025-05-15"
output: html_document
---


### **Basic setup**

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

rm(list=ls())         # clean work environment
gc()                  # clean memory
options(scipen=999)   # show numbers in normal format
options(width = 60)


# setting work directory of all files:
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/DataSets/52414_home_exam")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Libraries

```{r}
install.packages("sf")
library(sf)
```
